B1.Correctness.rationale: R2 blocker 完整修复: 5 处 CONTAINER_NAME 全部替换为 escaped_cname_deploy, printf %q 转义正确; N1-N3 修复均保持

B2.Security.rationale: R2 指出的 3 处 CONTAINER_NAME 未转义已全部补完, grep 确认 ssh_cmd docker 行无裸变量; 但 CHOWN_USER/CHOWN_GROUP 与 compose up 参数仍未转义
B2.Security.evidence: scripts/deploy-template.sh:468(chown 未转义); 441-444(compose up SERVER_PROJECT_PATH/COMPOSE_FILE/SERVICE_NAME 未转义); ssh_cmd.*docker.*\$\{?CONTAINER_NAME 匹配数为 0

B3.CodeQuality.rationale: 转义策略已统一: run_deploy 顶部一次性声明 escaped_cname_deploy + escaped_nginx_deploy, 消除重复声明与部分转义/部分未转义的维护困惑
B3.CodeQuality.evidence: scripts/deploy-template.sh:437-438(顶部统一声明); 448,463,468,480,488(全用转义变量)

B4.Tests.rationale: bash -n 通过, 但仍无针对安全修复的自动化回归测试(注入 payload 验证)
B4.Tests.evidence: scripts/deploy-template.sh 无 test/ 目录或 assert 块

B5.DX&Maintainability.rationale: 版本号/usage/日志阶段划分完整; R4 注释清晰说明修复原因; 转义变量命名一致(escaped_cname_* / escaped_nginx_*)
B5.DX&Maintainability.evidence: scripts/deploy-template.sh:32-36(版本), 57-86(usage), 437(B2 修复注释), 各阶段 log/ok/warn

suggestions: scripts/deploy-template.sh:468 — docker exec chown 中 CHOWN_USER/CHOWN_GROUP 未转义, 建议加 printf '%q'
scripts/deploy-template.sh:441-444 — compose up 中 SERVER_PROJECT_PATH/COMPOSE_FILE/SERVICE_NAME 未转义, 建议统一加 printf '%q'
